query:
SELECT 
  l.initialCapital,
  l.availableCash as currentCash,
  COALESCE(SUM(t.allocatedCapital + t.realizedPnl), 0) as totalProceeds,
  COALESCE(SUM(p.allocatedCapital), 0) as deployedCapital,
  (l.initialCapital - COALESCE(SUM(p.allocatedCapital), 0) + COALESCE(SUM(t.allocatedCapital + t.realizedPnl), 0) - (COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) * 2 + COUNT(DISTINCT p.id)) * 2.50) as correctCash
FROM paperLedger l
LEFT JOIN paperTrades t ON t.userId = l.userId AND t.sessionId = l.sessionId
LEFT JOIN paperPositions p ON p.userId = l.userId AND p.status = 'open'
WHERE l.userId = 1
GROUP BY l.userId, l.initialCapital, l.availableCash, l.sessionId;

SELECT 
  l.initialCapital,
  l.availableCash as currentCash,
  COALESCE(SUM(t.allocatedCapital + t.realizedPnl), 0) as totalProceeds,
  COALESCE(SUM(p.allocatedCapital), 0) as deployedCapital,
  (l.initialCapital - COALESCE(SUM(p.allocatedCapital), 0) + COALESCE(SUM(t.allocatedCapital + t.realizedPnl), 0) - (COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) * 2 + COUNT(DISTINCT p.id)) * 2.50) as correctCash
FROM paperLedger l
LEFT JOIN paperTrades t ON t.userId = l.userId AND t.sessionId = l.sessionId
LEFT JOIN paperPositions p ON p.userId = l.userId AND p.status = 'open'
WHERE l.userId = 1
GROUP BY l.userId, l.initialCapital, l.availableCash, l.sessionId;
